splash.body: Many reservation requests might compete against each other for the same impression inventory. Luckily, Matterhorn makes it easy to keep track reservation statuses. That'll help you to track your request and other conflicting requests.
Click each of the four icons to learn about each Matterhorn reservation status

conclusion.body:
Now that you have all the Matterhorn details, the last thing you need to know is how to use it!

Matterhorn reservations begin with a Salesforce opportunity and a conversation with your pod. Make sure you’re all on the same page about the media plan recommendations for this client. Afterwards, use the Create Sponsorship button in the opportunity to request a Matterhorn reservation.

Check out this video to walk you through the Matterhorn user interface
The best way to learn how to use Matterhorn is to see it in person! Make sure you ask your TA to show you how Matterhorn works during your next check-in.

items.title: Pending
items.description: This sponsorship doesn't have any conflicts or violate restrictions, but is awaiting PYM approval.

items.title: Pending Conflicts
items.description: This sponsorship may conflict or violate restrictions, and is awaiting PYM approval.

items.title: Pitched
items.description: PYM approved this sponsorship and reserved these impressions for your order.

items.title: Sold
items.description: Your pod closed the deal and the Salesforce probability greater than 100 percent!
